result.reason: This feature requests a more generic vault connector to integrate with various external credential management systems, enhancing flexibility and security.
result.approach: Implement a new ICredentialRepository that abstracts interaction with various vault services, define a corresponding configuration interface, integrate it into the CredentialServiceFactory, and provide a UI for configuring vault connections and mapping credentials to mRemoteNG connection properties.
